title: Temporary Strength
description: Gain [gold]Strength[/gold] until the end of this turn.
smart_description: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] until the end of this turn.
notes: Abstract class that applies temporary Strength bonuses until the end of turn. When the turn ends, the bonus is removed and the Strength value reverts. Can be subclassed with IsPositive=false to apply temporary Strength penalties.
